description_long: This is a modern tactical rifle with a matte black finish, featuring a modular design and a prominent rail system along the top for mounting accessories. The rifle is equipped with a collapsible stock, ergonomic pistol grip, and a detachable box magazine. The handguard is vented and includes a vertical foregrip for improved handling and control. Flip-up iron sights are mounted on the top rail, and the barrel is relatively short, ending with a flash hider. The overall construction appears robust, primarily composed of metal and polymer components, suitable for urban tactical scenarios.
description: A modern black tactical rifle with a collapsible stock, vertical foregrip, detachable magazine, and flip-up iron sights.
description_view_0: The rifle is viewed from the muzzle end, showing the flash hider and the narrow profile of the barrel and handguard.
description_view_1: Side profile reveals the collapsible stock, pistol grip, detachable magazine, vertical foregrip, and the full length of the top rail with flip-up sights.
description_view_2: Viewed from the stock end, the rifle's rear and buffer tube are visible, with the pistol grip and magazine extending downward.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile, showing similar features as view 1, including the collapsible stock, magazine, and accessory rails.
